It belongs to the group Rhyniophytes, which are a type of early land plant. Within the Rhyniophytes, Christopteris tricuspis is classified as a species of the genus Christopteris, along with other similar species. The Rhyniophytes are further classified under the division Rhyniophyta, which is a group of ancient, small, and non-vascular land plants.
